description_html:
Introducing the Forever Black Selvedge, a 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim, uniquely dyed with a permanent reactive dye to secure a lasting dark black color. Unlike traditional raw denim, where only the surface of the exterior warp yarns is dyed—leaving the core white—the yarns in the Forever Black Selvedge are thoroughly dyed through to the core. This process ensures that even with extensive wear, fading is significantly minimized, perfect for those who appreciate the enduring appeal of sleek black denim. Crafted from 100% cotton, this denim delivers a classic rigid raw denim feel. Each pair is proudly made in our Canadian factory, and is designed with tonal stitching, a button fly, black non-reflective hardware, and a black leather patch, creating a stealthy and clean aesthetic. 

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Easy Guy - MIJ14 - Haru Kaze Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ14 – Haru Kaze Selvedge marks the first lightweight denim in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan line. Weighing in at just 8.6oz, this denim is crafted in a 2x1 workwear style using lightweight slub yarn. The result is a fabric rich in neps on both the warp and weft sides.


Made from 100% recycled cotton, the interior weft is dyed brown, giving the denim a warm, inviting tone. This denim is loomstate, meaning it hasn't gone through conventional finishing processes like anti-skewing, singeing, or sanforization. This preserves the denim's natural hairy and slubby texture, and over time, the legs will twist—a hallmark of traditional denim craftsmanship. To manage shrinkage, the denim undergoes a tempi treatment—a soak and hang-dry process that eliminates shrinkage while maintaining the crispy raw feel.

Finishing touches include a sheepskin leather patch, 100% copper rivets with hidden back pocket rivets, and 100% iron buttons—hardware that will patina and age gracefully alongside the denim. Additionally, the signature Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan maple leaf embroidery is proudly featured on the back pocket.


The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ14 - Haru Kaze Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 8.6oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101129006

product_name: True Girl - Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by Mexico’s vibrant Day of the Dead tradition. Woven in Okayama, Japan on vintage shuttle looms, it uses rope-dyed short slub yarns to create a textured surface that will develop dramatic, high-contrast vertical fades over time. Made from 100% Mexican upland cotton, this denim pays tribute to its roots with a multicolor selvedge ID inspired by traditional Mexican sarape blankets. Additional details include contrast stitching, silver metallic hardware, and a vegetable-tanned leather patch and pocket flasher featuring original artwork by Mexico City tattoo artist José Ruiz (aka Koopa). His illustration depicts a skeleton guided to the underworld by a Xoloitzcuintli, the sacred Mexican hairless dog believed to escort souls to the afterlife.

True Girl has a straight outseam, a flattering high-rise, and timeless straight-leg silhouette.

product_name: Weird Guy - Le Selvedge De La Belle Province [In Store Exclusive]
description_html:
Available In Store Only - Retail Price: $229 CAD

Le Selvedge de la Belle Province is a 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim inspired by Montreal, Quebec, the home of Naked & Famous Denim.  La Belle Province is the motto of Quebec, which in English, translates to “The Beautiful Province”.  Within Canada, Quebec is distinct as it is a French-speaking nation with its own unique naughty words – which you will find woven right into the selvedge.  You will also notice the fleur de lis along with the white and blue line selvedge id, representing the symbols and colors of Quebec.  The denim is woven using short slub irregular-shaped yarns to give the fabric a gritty look.  The natural veg-tanned leather patch features an alternative edition of the classic tragic blond logo with the words Denim Tout Nu & Célèbre, French for Naked & Famous Denim, as well as some nods to Montreal landmarks.  The artwork was created by local Montreal comic book artist Andy Bélanger.  Other details include contrast stitching, and silver metallic buttons and rivets.

This jean was made to celebrate the hometown of Naked & Famous Denim and function as a special souvenir for those making the trip to Montreal.  This is why these jeans will not be available for purchase online, but will be exclusively available for in-store purchase at Tate + Yoko, located at 9096 St. Laurent.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Made in Quebec
  • SKU — 101325903

description_html:
Introducing the Sakura Slub Selvedge, a heavyweight 16.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. This denim is woven with big slub yarns that alternate between thick and thin sections, not only does this create an incredible denim texture but also impacting dye penetration during the rope dyeing process. As a result, sections of the yarn fade at different rates, unveiling a stunning spectrum of indigo hues as the denim ages. The interior weft is dyed with a pinkish hue, reminiscent of Japanese Cherry Blossoms, or “Sakura,” imparting a subtle cherry undertone to the denim. Made from 100% cotton, this denim provides a classic rigid raw denim feel. Each pair is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory and features contrast stitching, a button fly, antique copper-colored hardware, and a Horween color 8 burgundy pull up leather patch. 

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The High Noon Selvedge is a 10oz lightweight Japanese Selvedge Denim, expertly woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. Inspired by the rugged durability of 1900s era jeans, it captures the essence of that period. Just like denim from that era, the High Noon Selvedge is unsanforized to preserve authenticity. However, each pair has undergone a rinse wash to soften the fabric, minimize shrinkage, and simplify sizing. A defining feature of unsanforized denim is the characteristic leg twist, where the side seams twist along the fabric's bias. This adds a distinctive character to each pair, showcasing the old-world methods prior to the development of anti-skewing techniques designed to eliminate such twists. The denim sports a warm, mid-toned indigo hue, reminiscent of vintage pieces, and is highlighted with a orange line selvedge ID. This lighter shade of indigo facilitates quicker fading, enabling you to achieve lighter, vintage-style fades much more rapidly. Designed for immediate comfort, the High Noon Selvedge is lightweight and soft, requiring no break-in period. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, button fly, a dark brown leather patch, and silver metallic hardware. 

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

description_html:
Introducing the Flying Squirrel, a playfully named raw selvedge denim jean inspired by the furry agility of its namesake and designed to feel both lightweight and textured. Unlike most denim that undergoes singeing to remove surface fibers, this jean skips that finishing step so it retains a soft, slightly hairy surface beloved by denim enthusiasts.

The clean ecru selvedge edge is proudly displayed on the exposed coin pocket and cuffed hems while a premium waxed pull‑up leather patch adds depth and patina as it ages. The Flying Squirrel combines vintage-inspired texture, clean selvedge detailing and a comfortable fabric weight to deliver a standout jean that breaks in beautifully over time while remaining wearable across seasons.

product_name: Weird Guy - MIJ15 - Hand Dyed Natural Indigo Kakishibu Intangible Cultural Treasure Selvedge Denim
description_html:
This limited-edition release is part of our Made in Japan series, where we take the most traditional techniques, use the best materials we can get our hands on, and build everything with old-school construction. The MIJ15 is a 15oz selvedge denim, and the yarns are dyed using two ancient natural dyes—indigo and kakishibu.

The warp is dyed in Tokushima, on Shikoku Island, using a process that’s been around for hundreds of years. It’s such an important part of Japanese culture that it’s officially recognized as an Intangible Cultural Treasure. The yarns are bundled into hanks, dipped into natural indigo dye vats that are literally buried in the ground, then pulled out and oxidized in the open air. But because the yarn is bundled, some parts are exposed more than others. So what you get is uneven oxidation across the yarn—some parts darker, some lighter—and that creates a really rich, varied range of indigo shades across the fabric. This only happens with natural dye, and only when it’s done by hand. The weft is dyed with kakishibu, which is made from fermented persimmon. This dye’s been used in Japan for over a thousand years, and it gives the yarn a kind of burnt orange or brown tone that comes through the surface of the denim. The mix of that color underneath the indigo, plus the texture from the slubby yarns, gives this fabric so much dimension. It almost looks like it’s glowing in certain lighting.

The patch is real Shell Cordovan—dense horsehide that ages beautifully. And all the MIJ details are here: 100% iron buttons, copper rivets, raised belt loops, hidden back pocket rivets, selvedge fly, and the peekaboo selvedge on the coin pocket.

The Weird Guy is a regular tapered fit; medium rise, standard thigh and slight taper from the knee to hem.

description_html:
The Blue Wave Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, enhanced with a one-wash treatment for improved texture and comfort, while retaining the best qualities of raw denim. This classic indigo x white weft denim has been fabric-rinsed, unlike typical garment washes that can leave jeans looking used. This method reduces fabric shrinkage before cutting and sewing, resulting in neater seams and less puckering in the final product. Although not as rigid as classic raw denim, the rinse wash simply removes starch without significantly altering the denim's fading characteristics. We've essentially pre-soaked the jeans for you. The jeans boast classic Naked & Famous Denim features, including custom silver metallic hardware and a pull-up brown leather patch, all complemented by a golden brown selvedge ID and contrasting thread.

product_name: Easy Guy - Le Selvedge De La Belle Province [In Store Exclusive]
description_html:
Available In Store Only - Retail Price: $229 CAD

Le Selvedge de la Belle Province is a 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim inspired by Montreal, Quebec, the home of Naked & Famous Denim.  La Belle Province is the motto of Quebec, which in English, translates to “The Beautiful Province”.  Within Canada, Quebec is distinct as it is a French-speaking nation with its own unique naughty words – which you will find woven right into the selvedge.  You will also notice the fleur de lis along with the white and blue line selvedge id, representing the symbols and colors of Quebec.  The denim is woven using short slub irregular-shaped yarns to give the fabric a gritty look.  The natural veg-tanned leather patch features an alternative edition of the classic tragic blond logo with the words Denim Tout Nu & Célèbre, French for Naked & Famous Denim, as well as some nods to Montreal landmarks.  The artwork was created by local Montreal comic book artist Andy Bélanger.  Other details include contrast stitching, and silver metallic buttons and rivets.

This jean was made to celebrate the hometown of Naked & Famous Denim and function as a special souvenir for those making the trip to Montreal.  This is why these jeans will not be available for purchase online, but will be exclusively available for in-store purchase at Tate + Yoko, located at 9096 St. Laurent

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Super Guy - MIJ11 - Tokushima Hand Dyed Kakishibu Selvedge
description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan 11 - a masterpiece showcasing the richness and depth of ancient Japanese dyeing techniques. The MIJ11 is hand-dyed using the natural and eco-friendly Kakishibu or persimmon dyeing technique. This laborious process involves dipping the yarns by hand in the Kakishibu dye and letting them dry under the sun. The slow weaving process on vintage shuttle looms creates an organic, uneven texture, resulting in a denim with a unique warm brown hue and subtle variation in color.

All the details of MIJ11 are designed to evolve with time. The iron buttons will rust and the copper rivets will oxidize to a beautiful green patina. The jeans also come with a sheepskin leather patch. Each pair is made with care and attention to detail, reflecting the skill and craftsmanship of the artisans who continue to practice this craft.

The MIJ11 is a stunning example of the Kakishibu dyeing technique and a beautiful reminder of the value of traditional practices- they are a symbol of a timeless craft, and a tribute to the beauty of imperfection.

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The High Noon Selvedge is a 10oz lightweight Japanese Selvedge Denim, expertly woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. Inspired by the rugged durability of 1900s era jeans, it captures the essence of that period. Just like denim from that era, the High Noon Selvedge is unsanforized to preserve authenticity. However, each pair has undergone a rinse wash to soften the fabric, minimize shrinkage, and simplify sizing. A defining feature of unsanforized denim is the characteristic leg twist, where the side seams twist along the fabric's bias. This adds a distinctive character to each pair, showcasing the old-world methods prior to the development of anti-skewing techniques designed to eliminate such twists. The denim sports a warm, mid-toned indigo hue, reminiscent of vintage pieces, and is highlighted with a orange line selvedge ID. This lighter shade of indigo facilitates quicker fading, enabling you to achieve lighter, vintage-style fades much more rapidly. Designed for immediate comfort, the High Noon Selvedge is lightweight and soft, requiring no break-in period. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, button fly, a dark brown leather patch, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • 10oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

product_name: Super Guy - MIJ9 - "Tennen Ai" Natural Indigo Slub Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ 9 "Tennen Ai" Natural Indigo Selvedge is a 15oz Japanese selvedge denim made using 2 kinds of natural indigo dyed yarns. Natural indigo dye is produced in a fermentation process of the Indigofera plant that can take up to 1 year. Unlike synthetic indigo, with natural there is a great deal of color variation from one dye lot to another. For this denim 2 different batches of natural indigo were used to rope dye the cotton yarns. Once woven the result is a denim that has a hand dyed yarn look, as a spectrum of indigo yarns run vertically across the fabric. The denim is unsanforized but tempi treated, which shrinks the fabric but protects the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. These jeans are made in Japan and feature real iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, the MIJ maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, peek-a-boo selvedge coin pocket, micro busted out seam, and a selvedge button fly. Dyed, woven, cut, sewn, built in Japan.

The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.

The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.

To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.

The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim. 

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ10 - Okayama Spirit
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101505006

The MIJ11 is hand-dyed using the natural and eco-friendly Kakishibu or persimmon dyeing technique. This laborious process involves dipping the yarns by hand in the Kakishibu dye and letting them dry under the sun. The slow weaving process on vintage shuttle looms creates an organic, uneven texture, resulting in a denim with a unique warm brown hue and subtle variation in color.All the details of MIJ11 are designed to evolve with time. The iron buttons will rust and the copper rivets will oxidize to a beautiful green patina. The jeans also come with a sheepskin leather patch. Each pair is made with care and attention to detail, reflecting the skill and craftsmanship of the artisans who continue to practice this craft.The MIJ11 is a stunning example of the Kakishibu dyeing technique and a beautiful reminder of the value of traditional practices- they are a symbol of a timeless craft, and a tribute to the beauty of imperfection.The Easy Guy is a high-rise tapered fit with a relaxed top block and a sharp taper from knee to hem.MIJ11 - Tokushima Hand Dyed Kakishibu SelvedgeSTYLE / FIT—Easy Guy14oz Japanese Selvedge Denim100% CottonRinse-washed, Tempi-treatedMade in JapanSKU—101445706

description_html:
The Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by Mexico’s vibrant Day of the Dead tradition. Woven in Okayama, Japan on vintage shuttle looms, it uses rope-dyed short slub yarns to create a textured surface that will develop dramatic, high-contrast vertical fades over time. Made from 100% Mexican upland cotton, this denim pays tribute to its roots with a multicolor selvedge ID inspired by traditional Mexican sarape blankets. His illustration depicts a skeleton guided to the underworld by a Xoloitzcuintli, the sacred Mexican hairless dog believed to escort souls to the afterlife.

The Weird Guy is a regular tapered fit; medium rise, standard thigh and slight taper from the knee to hem.

product_name: True Guy -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. Her work eliminated the need for chemical dyes, significantly reducing the environmental impact of textile production. The FoxFibre® used in this denim is grown using regenerative organic farming methods, making it one of the most sustainable cotton sources available.

The denim is woven in Okayama, Japan, and spun in Osaka, using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown weft yarns. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. Over time, the fabric darkens and develops a rich patina with wear and washing.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 13oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Organic FoxFibre® Cotton
  • Button Fly

description_html:
The Fingerprint Denim gets its name from the pattern woven directly into the fabric. Up close, you’ll see a swirling, ridged pattern that resembles the lines of a fingerprint. This isn’t a print or surface treatment. It’s created through jacquard weaving, meaning the pattern is built into the structure of the denim itself. Flip the cuff and you can see the inverse design on the inside.

At 11oz, this denim sits comfortably in the lightweight to midweight range, making it a great all season option. The blend of 98% cotton and 2% stretch gives it an easy, broken-in feel from day one. It’s perfect for anyone who wants something unique without the stiffness of heavier raw denim.

From a distance, it reads clean and simple. Up close, it has a subtle complexity that adds depth to any outfit. Finishing details include tonal stitching, a full-grain brown leather patch, and silver metallic hardware.

product_name: Easy Guy - Flying Squirrel Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
Introducing the Flying Squirrel, a playfully named raw selvedge denim jean inspired by the furry agility of its namesake and designed to feel both lightweight and textured. Unlike most denim that undergoes singeing to remove surface fibers, this jean skips that finishing step so it retains a soft, slightly hairy surface beloved by denim enthusiasts.

Made from 10.75 oz per square yard indigo selvedge fabric woven on shuttle looms, it hits the ideal midweight range for year‑round wear balancing structure and breathability. The clean ecru selvedge edge is proudly displayed on the exposed coin pocket and cuffed hems while a premium waxed pull‑up leather patch adds depth and patina as it ages. The Flying Squirrel combines vintage-inspired texture, clean selvedge detailing and a comfortable fabric weight to deliver a standout jean that breaks in beautifully over time while remaining wearable across seasons.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Deep Sea Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, enhanced with a one-wash treatment for improved texture and comfort, while retaining the best qualities of raw denim. This deep indigo x indigo denim has been fabric-rinsed, unlike typical garment washes that can leave jeans looking used. This method reduces fabric shrinkage before cutting and sewing, resulting in neater seams and less puckering in the final product. Although not as rigid as classic raw denim, the rinse wash simply removes starch without significantly altering the denim's fading characteristics. We've essentially pre-soaked the jeans for you. This denim is made from 100% cotton and features a traditional redline selvedge ID.  Each pair is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory and features contrast stitching, a button fly, custom black mill-spec non-reflective hardware and a pull-up navy leather patch.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • Deep Sea Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — Easy Guy
  • 12.5oz Japanese Denim
  • 100% Cotton

  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — 101124506

description_html:
The Giant Hornet Selvedge draws inspiration from the Japanese giant hornet, a fearsome predator known for its size, aggression, and unmistakable yellow-and-black markings. We wanted a denim that captured that same raw intensity.

Crafted from 16oz Japanese Selvedge denim, the Giant Hornet Selvedge features a gritty, short-slub texture produced through low-tension weaving and the use of irregular yarns that create a rugged, uneven surface. Rope-dyed in deep indigo, the warp carries a subtle greenish cast that lends the fabric an “insect-like” tone. As the denim fades, this cast reveals a wide spectrum of high-contrast blue tones that emphasize the texture and depth of the fabric.

Finishing details include contrast stitching, a yellow hair-on leather patch, silver metallic hardware, and a distinctive yellow and black selvedge ID that ties the entire theme together.

product_name: True  Guy - MIJ14 - Haru Kaze Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ14 – Haru Kaze Selvedge marks the first lightweight denim in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan line. Weighing in at just 8.6oz, this denim is crafted in a 2x1 workwear style using lightweight slub yarn. The result is a fabric rich in neps on both the warp and weft sides.

Made from 100% recycled cotton, the interior weft is dyed brown, giving the denim a warm, inviting tone. This denim is loomstate, meaning it hasn't gone through conventional finishing processes like anti-skewing, singeing, or sanforization. This preserves the denim's natural hairy and slubby texture, and over time, the legs will twist—a hallmark of traditional denim craftsmanship. To manage shrinkage, the denim undergoes a tempi treatment—a soak and hang-dry process that eliminates shrinkage while maintaining the crispy raw feel.

Finishing touches include a sheepskin leather patch, 100% copper rivets with hidden back pocket rivets, and 100% iron buttons—hardware that will patina and age gracefully alongside the denim. Additionally, the signature Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan maple leaf embroidery is proudly featured on the back pocket.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 8.6oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101129021

description_html:
The Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection is celebrating its 10th iteration with the return of a fan favorite: the iconic Okayama Spirit Selvedge. This marks the first time the original has been rereleased since it was first released in 2013.

The Okayama Spirit is a 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim that is dyed using the indigo rope dyeing process. In this process, cotton yarns are repeatedly run through vats of indigo dye, but not long enough for the dye to fully penetrate the yarn core. This creates a unique pattern in the fabric as thicker sections of the yarn absorb more indigo and thinner sections absorb less. The yarns themselves also have an irregular, slubby texture which adds to the overall texture of the fabric. To further enhance the texture, the denim is slowly woven on vintage shuttle looms, which creates a wavy weave pattern when viewed up close. The combination of the irregular slubby yarns and the loose weaving of the fabric gives it an organic, uneven grain that is signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured look.

To preserve the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel of this unsanforized denim, the MIJ10 undergoes a tempi treatment which shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture. This removes the guesswork from sizing and allows you to get the correct size from the start. The MIJ10 also features a range of finishing touches that add to its character and appeal. These include 100% iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. The jeans also feature a maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, a signature of the MIJ series.

The MIJ10 is made in Japan from start to finish, ensuring its high quality. The expert craftsmanship that goes into each pair is evident in the attention to detail and care taken at every stage of the production process, from the dyeing of the yarn, weaving of the fabric, to the cutting and sewing of the denim. 

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ10 - Okayama Spirit
  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101505003

product_name: True Guy - MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
description_html:
Presenting the 'Okayama Spirit Kuro," the 13th edition of the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection. Taking inspiration from the original Okayama Spirit denim, this striking all-black silhouette is a seamless transformation - with "Kuro" meaning black in Japanese.

Crafted from 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim, the Okayama Spirit Kuro showcases a unique, uneven texture. The sulfur-dyed cotton yarns create an irregular tone, as the thicker sections absorb more dye while the thinner sections absorb less. When worn over time shades of black will fade to grey, creating an aesthetically pleasing uneven tone that gracefully fades at different rates, attributing to the unique look of this denim.  Enhanced by the slow weaving on vintage shuttle looms, the wavy weave pattern contributes to the denim's organic, uneven grain - a signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured appearance.

The Okayama Spirit Kuro Black undergoes a tempi treatment to preserve its hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture, ensuring you can select the perfect size from the start. The Okayama Spirit Kuro also boasts a host of finishing touches that enhance its character, including blacked-out iron capped buttons that rust, copper rivets that oxidize, raised belt loops that fade, a black deerskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. A maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket is a signature touch of the MIJ series.  

Every aspect of the Okayama Spirit Kuro is meticulously crafted in Japan, guaranteeing its superior quality. The expert craftsmanship behind each pair is evident in the intricate details and care taken throughout the entire production process, from dyeing the yarn and weaving the fabric to cutting and sewing the denim.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

product_description: The MIJ14 – Haru Kaze Selvedge marks the first lightweight denim in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan line. Weighing in at just 8.6oz, this denim is crafted in a 2x1 workwear style using lightweight slub yarn. The result is a fabric rich in neps on both the warp and weft sides.Made from 100% recycled cotton, the interior weft is dyed brown, giving the denim a warm, inviting tone. This denim is loomstate, meaning it hasn't gone through conventional finishing processes like anti-skewing, singeing, or sanforization. This preserves the denim's natural hairy and slubby texture, and over time, the legs will twist—a hallmark of traditional denim craftsmanship. To manage shrinkage, the denim undergoes a tempi treatment—a soak and hang-dry process that eliminates shrinkage while maintaining the crispy raw feel.Finishing touches include a sheepskin leather patch, 100% copper rivets with hidden back pocket rivets, and 100% iron buttons—hardware that will patina and age gracefully alongside the denim. Additionally, the signature Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan maple leaf embroidery is proudly featured on the back pocket.The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.MIJ14 - Haru Kaze SelvedgeSTYLE / FIT—Weird Guy8.6oz Japanese Selvedge Denim100% CottonButton FlyRinse-washed, Tempi-treatedMade in JapanSKU—101129003

product_name: Strong Guy - Flying Squirrel Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
Introducing the Flying Squirrel, a playfully named raw selvedge denim jean inspired by the furry agility of its namesake and designed to feel both lightweight and textured. Unlike most denim that undergoes singeing to remove surface fibers, this jean skips that finishing step so it retains a soft, slightly hairy surface beloved by denim enthusiasts.

Made from 10.75 oz per square yard indigo selvedge fabric woven on shuttle looms, it hits the ideal midweight range for year‑round wear balancing structure and breathability. The clean ecru selvedge edge is proudly displayed on the exposed coin pocket and cuffed hems while a premium waxed pull‑up leather patch adds depth and patina as it ages. The Flying Squirrel combines vintage-inspired texture, clean selvedge detailing and a comfortable fabric weight to deliver a standout jean that breaks in beautifully over time while remaining wearable across seasons.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

product_name: Super Guy - King Ghidorah: The Three-Headed Monster Denim
description_html:
Introducing the King Ghidorah Denim, a 14oz Japanese denim designed in tribute to one of Godzilla’s most formidable foes: the three-headed kaiju King Ghidorah, who made his debut in the 1964 film Ghidorah, the Three-Headed Monster. Known for his golden scales, hurricane winds, and gravity beams, King Ghidorah stands as a symbol of overwhelming extraterrestrial power.

The denim features a slubby 14oz fabric woven in Japan using a rare triple alternating weave, left-hand twill, right-hand twill, and broken twill, representing Ghidorah’s three independent heads. A gold weft mirrors the shimmering metallic color of his body, subtly visible through the twill lines of the indigo-dyed warp. The uneven texture enhances visual depth while promising strong fades with wear.

This denim is finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with licensed King Ghidorah® artwork, full-color Godzilla® poster print pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label. Cut and sewn in our Canadian factory, the jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

product_name: Super Guy - Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Dia De Los Muertos Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by Mexico’s vibrant Day of the Dead tradition. Woven in Okayama, Japan on vintage shuttle looms, it uses rope-dyed short slub yarns to create a textured surface that will develop dramatic, high-contrast vertical fades over time. Made from 100% Mexican upland cotton, this denim pays tribute to its roots with a multicolor selvedge ID inspired by traditional Mexican sarape blankets. Additional details include contrast stitching, silver metallic hardware, and a vegetable-tanned leather patch and pocket flasher featuring original artwork by Mexico City tattoo artist José Ruiz (aka Koopa). His illustration depicts a skeleton guided to the underworld by a Xoloitzcuintli, the sacred Mexican hairless dog believed to escort souls to the afterlife.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

product_name: Strong Guy -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. Her work eliminated the need for chemical dyes, significantly reducing the environmental impact of textile production. The FoxFibre® used in this denim is grown using regenerative organic farming methods, making it one of the most sustainable cotton sources available.

The denim is woven in Okayama, Japan, and spun in Osaka, using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown weft yarns. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. Over time, the fabric darkens and develops a rich patina with wear and washing.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

  • STYLE / FIT — Strong Guy
  • 13oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Organic FoxFibre® Cotton
  • Button Fly

product_name: Weird Guy - King Ghidorah: The Three-Headed Monster Denim
description_html:
Introducing the King Ghidorah Denim, a 14oz Japanese denim designed in tribute to one of Godzilla’s most formidable foes: the three-headed kaiju King Ghidorah, who made his debut in the 1964 film Ghidorah, the Three-Headed Monster. Known for his golden scales, hurricane winds, and gravity beams, King Ghidorah stands as a symbol of overwhelming extraterrestrial power.

The denim features a slubby 14oz fabric woven in Japan using a rare triple alternating weave, left-hand twill, right-hand twill, and broken twill, representing Ghidorah’s three independent heads. A gold weft mirrors the shimmering metallic color of his body, subtly visible through the twill lines of the indigo-dyed warp. The uneven texture enhances visual depth while promising strong fades with wear.

This denim is finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with licensed King Ghidorah® artwork, full-color Godzilla® poster print pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label. Cut and sewn in our Canadian factory, the jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Kawataro Selvedge is a fresh greencast interpretation of our legendary Japan Heritage denim. It draws inspiration from Kawataro, the mischievous Japanese river God, also known as Kappa. Kappa is notoriously famous for his love of cucumbers, sumo wrestling, and playful trickery. Crafted from 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge denim, the Kawataro Selvedge features a distinctly slubby, uneven texture created through low-tension weaving and the use of irregularly-shaped slub yarns. The yarns are rope-dyed in indigo, and due to their unique shape, the dye penetrates unevenly thus resulting in varied absorption across the fabric. As the denim fades with wear, it reveals a striking spectrum of indigo shades, producing high-contrast, three-dimensional fades. Additional details include contrast stitching, a custom Raging Kong leather patch, pink selvedge ID, and antique copper buttons and rivets.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

product_name: Super Guy - Sea Island Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Sea Island Selvedge is a 12oz Japanese selvedge denim crafted from Virgin American Sea Island Cotton—the most luxurious denim we’ve ever produced. Sea Island Cotton is an ultra-rare Extra-Long Staple cotton. Renowned for its silky luster, uniform texture, cashmere-like softness, and exceptional durability, this cotton has a rich and storied past. Originally cultivated in the West Indies in the 1600s, it was once so coveted that British royalty tried to keep it exclusive. In the 1800s, seeds made their way to the American colonies, but a devastating beetle infestation nearly wiped it out in the 1920s.

Fast forward to 2015…. seeds that were tucked away in a seed vault are plated in Texas and New Mexico. This American-grown strain, genetically identical to the original variety, is now being used by select Japanese mills, including ours. Inspired by 1920s-era denim, this fabric offers a glimpse into an alternate history. What if Sea Island Cotton had become the standard? Imagine a world where silky-soft, ultra-durable jeans was the norm! Finishing details include contrast stitching, a durable paper patch, antique copper hardware, and a pink selvedge ID.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

description_html:
Introducing the Forever Black Selvedge, a 12.5oz Japanese Selvedge Denim, uniquely dyed with a permanent reactive dye to secure a lasting dark black color. Unlike traditional raw denim, where only the surface of the exterior warp yarns is dyed—leaving the core white—the yarns in the Forever Black Selvedge are thoroughly dyed through to the core. This process ensures that even with extensive wear, fading is significantly minimized, perfect for those who appreciate the enduring appeal of sleek black denim. Crafted from 100% cotton, this denim delivers a classic rigid raw denim feel. Each pair is proudly made in our Canadian factory, and is designed with tonal stitching, a button fly, black non-reflective hardware, and a black leather patch, creating a stealthy and clean aesthetic. 

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

description_html:
The High Noon Selvedge is a 10oz lightweight Japanese Selvedge Denim, expertly woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. Inspired by the rugged durability of 1900s era jeans, it captures the essence of that period. Just like denim from that era, the High Noon Selvedge is unsanforized to preserve authenticity. However, each pair has undergone a rinse wash to soften the fabric, minimize shrinkage, and simplify sizing. A defining feature of unsanforized denim is the characteristic leg twist, where the side seams twist along the fabric's bias. This adds a distinctive character to each pair, showcasing the old-world methods prior to the development of anti-skewing techniques designed to eliminate such twists. The denim sports a warm, mid-toned indigo hue, reminiscent of vintage pieces, and is highlighted with a orange line selvedge ID. This lighter shade of indigo facilitates quicker fading, enabling you to achieve lighter, vintage-style fades much more rapidly. Designed for immediate comfort, the High Noon Selvedge is lightweight and soft, requiring no break-in period. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, button fly, a dark brown leather patch, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

product_name: True Guy - MIJ15 - Hand Dyed Natural Indigo x Kakishibu Intangible Cultural Treasure Selvedge Denim
description_html:
This limited-edition release is part of our Made in Japan series, where we take the most traditional techniques, use the best materials we can get our hands on, and build everything with old-school construction. The MIJ15 is a 15oz selvedge denim, and the yarns are dyed using two ancient natural dyes—indigo and kakishibu.

The warp is dyed in Tokushima, on Shikoku Island, using a process that’s been around for hundreds of years. It’s such an important part of Japanese culture that it’s officially recognized as an Intangible Cultural Treasure. The yarns are bundled into hanks, dipped into natural indigo dye vats that are literally buried in the ground, then pulled out and oxidized in the open air. But because the yarn is bundled, some parts are exposed more than others. So what you get is uneven oxidation across the yarn—some parts darker, some lighter—and that creates a really rich, varied range of indigo shades across the fabric. This only happens with natural dye, and only when it’s done by hand.The weft is dyed with kakishibu, which is made from fermented persimmon. This dye’s been used in Japan for over a thousand years, and it gives the yarn a kind of burnt orange or brown tone that comes through the surface of the denim. The mix of that color underneath the indigo, plus the texture from the slubby yarns, gives this fabric so much dimension. It almost looks like it’s glowing in certain lighting.

The patch is real Shell Cordovan—dense horsehide that ages beautifully. And all the MIJ details are here: 100% iron buttons, copper rivets, raised belt loops, hidden back pocket rivets, selvedge fly, and the peekaboo selvedge on the coin pocket.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge fly, and a micro busted outseam. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

Introducing the Workforce Selvedge, a 10.9oz lightweight Japanese selvedge denim that perfectly captures the essence of traditional workwear with its classic workwear blue tone. This denim is distinctively constructed with a slubby and neppy white weft yarn, which scatters cotton specks across both the front and back of the fabric, infusing it with authentic old-school flair. Further adding its vintage appeal is the classic blue line selvedge ID. Crafted from 100% cotton, the denim starts off crisp but quickly softens, providing comfort from the first wear. Its lighter shade of indigo accelerates the fading process, allowing you to achieve lighter, vintage-style fades with ease. Proudly made in our Canadian factory, these jeans are completed with contrast white stitching, a button fly, a wet bark vintage-style cardboard patch, and silver metallic hardware.

product_name: Weird Guy - MIJ9 - "Tennen Ai" Natural Indigo Slub Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ 9 "Tennen Ai" Natural Indigo Selvedge is a 15oz Japanese selvedge denim made using 2 kinds of natural indigo dyed yarns. Natural indigo dye is produced in a fermentation process of the Indigofera plant that can take up to 1 year. Unlike synthetic indigo, with natural there is a great deal of color variation from one dye lot to another. For this denim 2 different batches of natural indigo were used to rope dye the cotton yarns. Once woven the result is a denim that has a hand dyed yarn look, as a spectrum of indigo yarns run vertically across the fabric. The denim is unsanforized but tempi treated, which shrinks the fabric but protects the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. These jeans are made in Japan and feature real iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, the MIJ maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, peek-a-boo selvedge coin pocket, micro busted out seam, and a selvedge button fly. Dyed, woven, cut, sewn, built in Japan.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ9 - "Tennen Ai" Natural Indigo Slub Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 15oz Japanese Unsanforized Selvedge Denim
  • Tempi treated
  • 100% Cotton
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101560103

description_html:

description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, and selvedge fly. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a medium rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • MIJ12 - Aomidori Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — True Guy
  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101056621

Note: The True Guy features a standard selvedge out seam and not the micro out seam detail as seen in other MIJ models.

product_name: Strong Guy - Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Leatherface Selvedge is our Halloween release, built around one of the most legendary horror films of all time: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre (1974). Grainy, brutal, and stripped of polish, the movie still feels dangerous, like something that wasn’t supposed to make it to theaters. Its tension comes from what it withholds: there’s little blood, no music, and almost no dialogue from the killer. Just heat, noise, and panic.

This fabric is made with 100% Texas-grown cotton, It’s spun into a 14.5oz rope-dyed indigo selvedge denim with a pale yellow weft, echoing Leatherface’s worn butcher’s apron. The color isn’t bright or clean, it’s the muted, washed-out yellow you see in aged canvas under harsh light.

The selvedge ID is finished in silver and red, nodding to the chrome of the chainsaw and the violence it leaves behind. The fabric is woven in Japan on shuttle looms, giving it a rigid hand and vertical texture that will evolve with wear and fade with time.

Each pair includes a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, embossed and foil-stamped with officially licensed Leatherface artwork. The pocket bags are fully printed in color with film stills from the original 1974 release. And the co-branded woven label pulls from an actual newspaper ad used to promote the movie’s theatrical run.

Every element was designed to feel true to the film.

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

  • Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
  • STYLE / FIT — Strong Guy
  • 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — TCM144016

description_html:
Introducing the Indigo Sashiko, a 12.5oz indigo rope-dyed Japanese twill, woven with a raised running stitch pattern reminiscent of Judo uniforms. This fabric is highly textured, with the running stitches prominently raised above the base fabric. Inspired by the rigorous demands of Judo, which focuses on grabs and throws, the textured and grippy surface of this fabric provides an ideal base for indigo dye. As the raised portions of the stitches fade at slightly different rates than the base fabric, they create a beautifully nuanced fade pattern. This fabric was woven on a special jacquard loom, capable of creating complex patterns. Made from 100% cotton, this fabric offers a soft hand feel. Each pair is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, featuring tonal stitching, a button fly, black non-reflective hardware, and a deep navy leather patch.

product_description: Introducing the Indigo Sashiko, a 12.5oz indigo rope-dyed Japanese twill, woven with a raised running stitch pattern reminiscent of Judo uniforms. This fabric is highly textured, with the running stitches prominently raised above the base fabric. product_name: Easy Guy - MIJ13 - Okayama Spirit Kuro
description_html:
Presenting the 'Okayama Spirit Kuro," the 13th edition of the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan (MIJ) collection. Taking inspiration from the original Okayama Spirit denim, this striking all-black silhouette is a seamless transformation - with "Kuro" meaning black in Japanese.

Crafted from 16oz unsanforized slubby Japanese selvedge denim, the Okayama Spirit Kuro showcases a unique, uneven texture. The sulfur-dyed cotton yarns create an irregular tone, as the thicker sections absorb more dye while the thinner sections absorb less. When worn over time shades of black will fade to grey, creating an aesthetically pleasing uneven tone that gracefully fades at different rates, attributing to the unique look of this denim.  Enhanced by the slow weaving on vintage shuttle looms, the wavy weave pattern contributes to the denim's organic, uneven grain - a signature of the Okayama Spirit's iconic textured appearance.

The Okayama Spirit Kuro Black undergoes a tempi treatment to preserve its hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. This process shrinks the fabric while maintaining its texture, ensuring you can select the perfect size from the start. The Okayama Spirit Kuro also boasts a host of finishing touches that enhance its character, including blacked-out iron capped buttons that rust, copper rivets that oxidize, raised belt loops that fade, a black deerskin leather patch with the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge button fly, and a micro busted outseam. A maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket is a signature touch of the MIJ series.  

Every aspect of the Okayama Spirit Kuro is meticulously crafted in Japan, guaranteeing its superior quality. The expert craftsmanship behind each pair is evident in the intricate details and care taken throughout the entire production process, from dyeing the yarn and weaving the fabric to cutting and sewing the denim.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan

description_html:
Introducing the Prototype Selvedge, a 15oz Japanese selvedge denim made with big slub, irregular-sized yarns to create an incredibly textured denim with a highly visible raised texture. These slub yarns, which alternate between thick and thin sections, create a remarkable texture and impact dye penetration during the rope dyeing process. As a result, sections of the yarn fade at different rates, unveiling a stunning spectrum of indigo hues as the denim ages. This fabric comes from our archives, originally serving as the "prototype" for the Pickle Rick selvedge from our Rick & Morty collaboration. Unlike the Pickle Rick style, which features a greencast hue, this denim showcases a classic indigo tone while sharing the same yellow and green selvedge ID. Additionally, the jeans features classic finishing details, including contrast stitching, a button fly, silver metallic hardware, and a brown pull-up leather patch. Each pair is proudly crafted in our Canadian factory.

product_name: Strong Guy - King Ghidorah: The Three-Headed Monster Denim
description_html:
Introducing the King Ghidorah Denim, a 14oz Japanese denim designed in tribute to one of Godzilla’s most formidable foes: the three-headed kaiju King Ghidorah, who made his debut in the 1964 film Ghidorah, the Three-Headed Monster. Known for his golden scales, hurricane winds, and gravity beams, King Ghidorah stands as a symbol of overwhelming extraterrestrial power.

The denim features a slubby 14oz fabric woven in Japan using a rare triple alternating weave, left-hand twill, right-hand twill, and broken twill, representing Ghidorah’s three independent heads. A gold weft mirrors the shimmering metallic color of his body, subtly visible through the twill lines of the indigo-dyed warp. The uneven texture enhances visual depth while promising strong fades with wear.

This denim is finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with licensed King Ghidorah® artwork, full-color Godzilla® poster print pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label. Cut and sewn in our Canadian factory, the jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

  • STYLE / FIT — Strong Guy
  • 14oz Japanese Fabric
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Made in Canada
  • SKU — GOD134916

product_name: True Guy - Flying Squirrel Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
Introducing the Flying Squirrel, a playfully named raw selvedge denim jean inspired by the furry agility of its namesake and designed to feel both lightweight and textured. Unlike most denim that undergoes singeing to remove surface fibers, this jean skips that finishing step so it retains a soft, slightly hairy surface beloved by denim enthusiasts.

Made from 10.75 oz per square yard indigo selvedge fabric woven on shuttle looms, it hits the ideal midweight range for year‑round wear balancing structure and breathability. The clean ecru selvedge edge is proudly displayed on the exposed coin pocket and cuffed hems while a premium waxed pull‑up leather patch adds depth and patina as it ages. The Flying Squirrel combines vintage-inspired texture, clean selvedge detailing and a comfortable fabric weight to deliver a standout jean that breaks in beautifully over time while remaining wearable across seasons.

The True Guy is a straight leg fit with a regular rise along with extra room in the seat and thigh that falls straight from knee to hem.

product_name: Super Guy - MIJ7 - Yahan Midnight Selvedge
description_html:
The MIJ7 ¢‚¬€œ Yahan Midnight Selvedge is an unsanforized 17oz slubby Japanese selvedge denim dyed to such a deep shade of indigo that it appears black. Indigo rope dyeing is a delicate process of running cotton yarns through two story dye vats quickly enough that the dye cannot penetrate the core of the yarn. Then the yarn dries and is dipped again, dries and is dipped again. The yarns are dipped dozens of times to achieve that raw denim shade. But here, with just a little black dye added, these yarns have been dyed over and over so many times that they appear black. With wear and age, the opposite process occurs. Each layer of indigo chips away revealing dark blues, then medium bright blues, then light blues, then finally the white core of the yarn. This fabric is made to celebrate the full spectrum of variegated indigo shades. The yarns themselves are irregular, slubby, and woven loosely giving the fabric an organic, uneven grain. The denim is unsanforized but tempi treated, which shrinks the fabric but protects the hairiness, grittiness, and raw denim feel. The MIJ7 builds in the unparalleled detailing of the Made in Japan collection: black iron buttons that will rust, copper rivets that will oxidize, raised belt loops that will fade, a Japanese sheepskin leather patch with the ¢‚¬œFlower of Carnage¢‚¬� logo, the MIJ maple leaf embroidered onto the back pocket, micro busted outseam, and a selvedge button fly. Dyed, woven, cut, sewn, built in Japan. The Super Guy is a skinny fit with a medium rise, a slim top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

  • MIJ7 - Yahan Midnight Selvedge
  • STYLE / FIT — Super Guy
  • 17oz Japanese Selvedge Denim

description_html:

description_html:
Introducing the Mechagodzilla Selvedge, a 19oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by Mechagodzilla’s first appearance in the 1974 film Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla. In the film, Mechagodzilla is a robotic double of Godzilla, cold, weaponized, and engineered for destruction. This denim reflects those visual elements with a structured, metallic-toned design.

The denim is woven in Japan using 100% cotton and features an iron grey weft visible beneath a rope-dyed indigo warp, evoking the polished steel exterior of Mechagodzilla. The heavy 19oz weight gives the fabric a stiff, armor-like hand that softens with wear while retaining deep texture. A silver and red selvedge ID runs along the outseam, mirroring Mechagodzilla’s metal body and glowing red sensors.

Finished with a natural veg tan leather patch embossed and silver foil-stamped with Mechagodzilla® artwork, full-color pocket bags featuring Godzilla® movie posters, and a dual-branded woven label. Cut and sewn in Canada, the jeans are built with contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

description_html:
The Fingerprint Denim gets its name from the pattern woven directly into the fabric. Up close, you’ll see a swirling, ridged pattern that resembles the lines of a fingerprint. This isn’t a print or surface treatment. It’s created through jacquard weaving, meaning the pattern is built into the structure of the denim itself. Flip the cuff and you can see the inverse design on the inside.

At 11oz, this denim sits comfortably in the lightweight to midweight range, making it a great all season option. The blend of 98% cotton and 2% stretch gives it an easy, broken-in feel from day one. It’s perfect for anyone who wants something unique without the stiffness of heavier raw denim.

From a distance, it reads clean and simple. Up close, it has a subtle complexity that adds depth to any outfit. Finishing details include tonal stitching, a full-grain brown leather patch, and silver metallic hardware.

description_html:
Introducing the 1954 Godzilla Selvedge, a 16oz Japanese selvedge denim inspired by the original Godzilla film from 1954. Shot in stark black-and-white, the movie blended realism and symbolism and it’s here where the legend began. This denim mirrors that aesthetic with a black warp and white weft construction and slubby texture that evokes Godzilla’s scaled skin.

Woven in Japan using rope-dyed black warp yarns and undyed white weft yarns, the fabric has pronounced grain and a heavyweight hand that develops high-contrast fades over time. The black-and-white selvedge ID reinforces the original visual tone.

Finished with a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch embossed and foil-stamped with classic 1954 Godzilla® artwork, black-and-white film-poster printed pocket bags, and a dual-branded woven label, all made in Canada with contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware.

product_name: Strong Guy - Offshoot Broken Twill Selvedge
description_html:
The Offshoot Broken Twill Selvedge is a 13.75 oz Japanese Selvedge Denim. The Offshoot series represents a reimagining of classic Naked & Famous Denim fabrics in new and interesting ways. For the Offshoot Broken Twill Selvedge we took the warp and weft yarns used in our Left Hand Twill Selvedge, and switched up the construction to Broken Twill. Instead of being a directional twill denim, broken twill denim is woven in a zig zag pattern. With this you’ll be able to see for yourself just how construction can completely change how a denim looks, feels, and fades! The denim has a smooth surface texture and traditional rigid raw denim feel. Cut, sewn, built in Canada with contrast stitching, single blue line and white selvedge ID, full grain brown leather patch, and silver metallic buttons and rivets.  

The Strong Guy is a relaxed straight fit; high rise, fuller in the seat and thigh that falls to a wide leg opening.

product_name: Easy Guy - Chinese New Year - Year Of The Snake
description_html:
Celebrate the Year of the Snake with our 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, the latest in our series honoring the Chinese Zodiac for the lunar new year. This fabric is crafted using short slub yarn. While the texture isn’t overly pronounced, these short slubs become more apparent as the denim fades, emphasizing distinctive vertical fade patterns. Made from 100% cotton, this raw denim offers a comfortable fit from the start, requiring very minimal break-in time. The selvedge ID proudly displays the traditional Chinese New Year colors of red and gold. The natural veg-tanned leather patch and pocket flasher are the work of Andy Belanger, a talented comic book artist based in the Montreal area. With time, the leather patch will develop a rich patina, evolving alongside the denim to enhance its beauty. Adding a cultural touch, the jeans feature red pocket bags, a nod to the traditional red pocket that symbolizes good fortune and prosperity for the year ahead. Proudly crafted in our Canadian factory, these jeans feature contrast stitching, a button fly, and silver metallic hardware. 

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

product_name: Pullover Crewneck - Iron Mordant FoxFibre® Double Heavyweight French Terry
description_html:
The Iron Mordant Foxfibre® Double Heavyweight French Terry - Coyote 80 is one of the heaviest knits available today, boasting an impressive 825 GSM (24.3oz per square yard). Its deep, earthy brown hue isn't the result of traditional dyeing but rather a natural blend of Foxfibre® cotton and an iron mordant treatment, creating a rich, organic tone that deepens over time.

Foxfibre® is a naturally colored cotton, organically gown on a single-origin farm in New Mexico, eliminating the need for artificial dyes.

Our Coyote 80 blend showcases the deepest and richest shades in the FoxFibre® range, blending 80% FoxFibre® with 20% organically grown Extra Long Staple cotton. This combination enhances the material's softness and durability.

To further enrich the fabric's tone, the cotton fibers undergo an iron mordant treatment—a traditional process where fibers are soaked in an iron-rich solution that reacts with the cotton's natural pigments. This process intensifies and darkens the fabric's color, transforming it into a deep, earthy brown with rich dimension and character. Over time, Foxfibre® cotton continues to develop and evolve in color, gradually enhancing its depth for a truly one-of-a-kind aging process.

Produced in Wakayama, Japan, using circular knitting machines, this French terry fabric is characterized by its low gauge (10G) knit, and irregular surface texture that's complemented by large, soft loops on the interior, enhancing both comfort and aesthetic appeal. 

Our Pullover Crewneck features a modern athletic fit, highlighted by a ribbed binder collar that features a vintage-style inlaid V gusset. Its raglan sleeves, ribbed side panels, cuffs, and hem offer optimal support and comfort, while the flat seam construction provides a polished finish. Expertly crafted in Japan ensuring superior quality.

  • Iron Mordant FoxFibre® Double Heavyweight French Terry
  • STYLE / FIT — Pullover Crewneck
  • 825gsm / 24.3oz per square yard
  • 100% Cotton
  • Japanese Fabric
  • Made in Japan

product_name: Weird Guy -  Brown Fox Selvedge - Brown
description_html:
Introducing the Brown Fox Selvedge, a 13oz Japanese selvedge denim made entirely from organic FoxFibre® cotton—grown in California by cotton breeder and environmental pioneer Sally Fox. This denim contains no dyes or bleach. The brown color comes directly from the cotton plant itself.

Sally Fox began her work in the 1980s, selectively breeding heirloom brown cotton varieties with white Pima to create long-staple, naturally pigmented cotton that could be commercially spun. Her work eliminated the need for chemical dyes, significantly reducing the environmental impact of textile production. The FoxFibre® used in this denim is grown using regenerative organic farming methods, making it one of the most sustainable cotton sources available.

The denim is woven in Okayama, Japan, and spun in Osaka, using undyed natural warp yarns and naturally brown weft yarns. The result is a warm, earthy-toned fabric with subtle surface variation and a soft hand. Over time, the fabric darkens and develops a rich patina with wear and washing.

The Weird Guy is a standard tapered fit with a medium rise, a comfortable top block, and a taper from knee to hem.

FoxFibre® Colorganic® is a registered trademark of Sally Fox.

  • STYLE / FIT — Weird Guy
  • 13oz Japanese Selvedge
  • 100% Organic FoxFibre® Cotton
  • Button Fly

description_html:
Introducing the Aomidori Selvedge, the 12th edition in the Naked & Famous Denim Made in Japan collection. Deriving its name from the Japanese "Aomidori," meaning blue-green, this denim offers a stunning visual twist. At first glance, it resembles traditional indigo denim, yet it uniquely fades to a captivating greenish hue, thanks to an innovative dye technique.

There are two primary methods to achieve greencast denim: top dye and bottom dye. The top dye method involves adding a green tint after the indigo, giving the denim an initial green appearance. Conversely, the bottom dye technique, used for the Aomidori Selvedge, applies a green tint before the indigo rope dye process. This unique approach allows the denim to gradually reveal its greenish hue as it fades, setting it apart in both style and wear pattern.

Crafted with a robust 16oz weight, the denim is woven on vintage shuttle looms in Okayama, Japan. It remains unsanforized to retain its purest form, free from mechanical shrinkage processes, anti-skewing, or singeing. This preservation enhances the fabric’s texture, characterized by its pronounced vertical streakiness and the irregular sizes of its bumpy yarns, which fade at slightly different rates, adding depth and character to each pair.

To maintain its raw, textured appeal, the Aomidori Selvedge undergoes a tempi treatment. This process carefully shrinks the fabric while preserving its distinct characteristics, ensuring you can select your ideal fit from the start.

The jeans also boast a variety of expert finishing touches that contribute to its unique character: 100% iron buttons that develop a rust and patina, copper rivets that naturally oxidize, raised belt loops that fade and add dimension with wear, a premium sheepskin leather patch featuring the "Flower of Carnage" logo, a selvedge fly, and a micro busted outseam. Additionally, a maple leaf embroidered on the back pocket adds a signature touch, encapsulating the heritage of the MIJ series.

Every element of the Aomidori Selvedge is meticulously crafted in Japan, showcasing the exceptional skill and attention to detail that goes into every step of the production process—from the dyeing of the yarns and the weaving of the fabric to the cutting and sewing of the final garment.

The Easy Guy is a relaxed tapered fit; regular rise, fuller in the seat and thigh with a sharp taper from knee to hem.

  • 16oz Japanese Selvedge Denim
  • 100% Cotton
  • Button Fly
  • Rinse-washed, Tempi-treated
  • Made in Japan
  • SKU — 101056606

product_name: Super Guy - Texas Chainsaw Massacre "Leatherface" Selvedge - Indigo
description_html:
The Leatherface Selvedge is our Halloween release, built around one of the most legendary horror films of all time: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre (1974). Grainy, brutal, and stripped of polish, the movie still feels dangerous, like something that wasn’t supposed to make it to theaters. Its tension comes from what it withholds: there’s little blood, no music, and almost no dialogue from the killer. Just heat, noise, and panic.

This fabric is made with 100% Texas-grown cotton, It’s spun into a 14.5oz rope-dyed indigo selvedge denim with a pale yellow weft, echoing Leatherface’s worn butcher’s apron. The color isn’t bright or clean, it’s the muted, washed-out yellow you see in aged canvas under harsh light.

The selvedge ID is finished in silver and red, nodding to the chrome of the chainsaw and the violence it leaves behind. The fabric is woven in Japan on shuttle looms, giving it a rigid hand and vertical texture that will evolve with wear and fade with time.

Each pair includes a natural vegetable-tanned leather patch, embossed and foil-stamped with officially licensed Leatherface artwork. The pocket bags are fully printed in color with film stills from the original 1974 release. And the co-branded woven label pulls from an actual newspaper ad used to promote the movie’s theatrical run.

Every element was designed to feel true to the film.

The Super Guy is a slim tapered fit; medium rise, slim thigh and taper from the knee to hem.

  • STYLE / FIT — Super Guy
  • 14.5oz Japanese Selvedge

  • Made in Canada

Woven in Okayama, Japan on vintage shuttle looms, it uses rope-dyed short slub yarns to create a textured surface that will develop dramatic, high-contrast vertical fades over time. description_html:
The Blue Wave Selvedge is a 12.5oz Japanese selvedge denim, enhanced with a one-wash treatment for improved texture and comfort, while retaining the best qualities of raw denim. This classic indigo x white weft denim has been fabric-rinsed, unlike typical garment washes that can leave jeans looking used. This method reduces fabric shrinkage before cutting and sewing, resulting in neater seams and less puckering in the final product. Although not as rigid as classic raw denim, the rinse wash simply removes starch without significantly altering the denim's fading characteristics. We've essentially pre-soaked the jeans for you. The jeans boast classic Naked & Famous Denim features, including custom silver metallic hardware and a pull-up brown leather patch, all complemented by a golden brown selvedge ID and contrasting thread.
